summary: Elric Mervinger is presented with the ice Orb and tasked by an old man to take it to the God of Camellias. The orb contains the essence of winter, which can be used to harness the power of the elemental. Elric's guide for this task is Otto Han, also known as 'Winter', who has returned from death. As Elric navigates through the tests, he realizes that these are not only meant to increase his power but also help Mephisto recover his strength. This process could potentially lead to Elric becoming stronger than ever before.
key_moments: Elric is given the ice Orb and tasked with taking it to the God of Camellias
Otto Han, also known as 'Winter', returns from death to guide Elric through the tests
The true purpose of the tests is revealed: to help Mephisto recover his strength
